chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1264 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Zia-ul-Haque Kamboh, Advocate for respondents No.7 and 8. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the respondent No.7 and 8 submits that petitioners have been working with the department diligently for the past fifteen years, and they are willing to process their case for regularization. After such statement, the counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition. Accordingly, under the circumstances instant petition is disposed of, with directions to process the case of petitioners (as suggested by counsel for the respondents No.7 & 8) and complete the same within three months. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
